{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":101548,"duration_api_ms":96491,"num_turns":18,"result":"Phase 0 완료. 변경 요약:

**MonthView:**
- 고정 ±120개월 → `@State monthsBefore/monthsAfter` (초기 48) 동적 확장
- 끝에서 5번째 월 `onAppear` 시 24개월씩 확장
- `monthPages()`는 `@State` + `anchorMonth`에만 의존 — `@Observable` 프로퍼티 무관
- `displayedYear` 업데이트가 `monthPages()` 재계산을 트리거하지 않음
- MonthSection의 `.task`에서 `eventCounts != nil`이면 스킵 (쿼리 폭주 방지)

**YearView:**
- 고정 ±20년 → `@State yearsBefore/yearsAfter` (초기 20) 동적 확장
- 끝에서 3번째 년도 `onAppear` 시 10년씩 확장
- EventKit 쿼리 없음 (순수 UI 렌더링)","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"bd35a01d-c8fd-4dfc-9b84-04898860ee2e","total_cost_usd":0.5406827500000001,"usage":{"input_tokens":11,"cache_creation_input_tokens":36503,"cache_read_input_tokens":372818,"output_tokens":5043,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":36503,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":11,"outputTokens":5043,"cacheReadInputTokens":372818,"cacheCreationInputTokens":36503,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.5406827500000001,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"2a3b8214-adb4-48a9-9f90-337e916fb56e"}
